sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀκροατής

- Transliteration: Akroates

- Phonetic: ak-ro-at-ace'

- Definition:

1. a hearer

- Origin: from akroaomai (to listen, apparently an intens. of G191)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From ἀκροάομαι akroaomai (to listen; apparently an intensive of G191); a hearer (merely): - hearer.
